basic_details.job_title: NIELIT Bikaner FOC cum Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT Bikaner) FOC cum Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIELIT Bikaner FOC cum Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.E. / B.Tech in Electronics, CS/ IT or equivalent field MCA/M Sc (IT/CS)/ with Graduation from a recognized university Desirable: Minimum of one year of experience in administrative work and teaching

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIELIT Bikaner FOC cum Faculty (CSE/IT) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 19 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the FOC cum Faculty (CSE/IT) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the FOC cum Faculty (CSE/IT) position at NIELIT Bikaner.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the FOC cum Faculty (CSE/IT) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Contractual.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the NIELIT Bikaner office.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is 2026/01.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for NIELIT Bikaner recruitments?
faq.answer: The official website for NIELIT Bikaner recruitments is https://nielit.gov.in/ajmer/recruitments.
